name: @quoin/tokens-spectrum
description: Adobe Spectrum (light theme) palette translated onto the Quoin canonical semantic-token namespace.

attribution.harvestNotes: Adobe Spectrum tokens extracted from @adobe/spectrum-tokens dist/json/variables.json. Light theme values resolved from `sets.light.value`. Extraction method: B. Algorithm: @adobe/spectrum-tokens@14.7.0, inputs {"mode":"light"}. Mapping: Spectrum's `accent-color-N`, `gray-N`, `red-color-N`, etc. flattened. Mapping: surface = gray-50, text = gray-900, accent = accent-color-900 (Adobe blue), critical = negative-background-color-default, success = positive-background-color-default, warning = notice-background-color-default.
